# Copilot Instructions

This repository's canonical agent instructions live in
[`AGENTS.md`](../AGENTS.md) (with `CLAUDE.md` symlinked to it).

Read `AGENTS.md` before making changes. In particular:

- Build phase-by-phase against `wiki/__plans/`; the master migration plan is the
  source of truth.
- Honour the non-negotiable invariants (API-first, Microsoft Foundry Agent Service,
  not mortgage advice, FluentResults for expected failures, tests with every slice).
- Run `scripts/quality-gate.sh` before finishing; the drift check must report 0 fail.
- Do not add co-author / "generated by" attribution to commits, PRs, or comments.
